name: Open Faced Rump Roast Sandwiches (Rr)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast a slice of rye bread.
2. Spread thinly with butter, margarine or your favorite low-fat spread.
3. Top with thinly sliced leftover rump roast.
4. Add a slice of Monterey Jack cheese.
5. Sprinkle a dab of hamburger relish on top.
6. Drizzle a tablespoon of vinaigrette over the sandwich.
By Judi Moseley  on Jan 4, 1998.
